message:
feat(conformance): add dirent_ops conformance executors (bd-ihl3)

Add conformance test executors for 3 directory functions:
- opendir: opens directory, returns DIR_PTR or NULL
- readdir: reads directory entry from valid_root_dir
- closedir: closes directory handle from valid_dir

Dynamic handle cases are skipped with SKIP_DYNAMIC_HANDLE marker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
